name: Calzone Dough
recipeInstructions:
1. Fit the metal blade into a food processor.
2. Add all dry ingredients and olive oil to the food processor.
3. Slowly add water while processing on KNEAD until dough forms a ball.
4. Place dough in an oiled bowl and let rise for 1 - 1 1/2 hours, covered.
5. Fill with Calzone Filling and bake at 400°F for 30 minutes.
